universal-3-pro.description: Universal-3 Pro — 6 languages, advanced prompting, diarization
universal-3-pro.pricingNotes: AssemblyAI lists Universal-3 Pro at $0.21/hour, billed per second. Free allowance, volume discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: AssemblyAI allows larger remote URLs than upload API submissions. The current CLI uploads first, so effectiveBytes tracks the smaller upload cap.
